title: Epiblepharis glazioviana
taxonomy: Epiblepharis glazioviana is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to Brazil and is also known by its synonym, Acanthella glazioviana. The classification of Epiblepharis glazioviana includes it being a member of the order Lamiales. This plant is a type of shrub that belongs to the genus Epiblepharis. The Acanthaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants.

intro: Epiblepharis glazioviana, also known as the Brazilian passionflower or Glaziov's passionflower, is a plant species native to Brazil, belonging to the family Passifloraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including its potential to act as an anxiolytic and sedative, reducing anxiety and promoting sleep.
